result.stdout:
USAGE:
    FakeGet.dll [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    FakeGet.dll package.nupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    push       Upload a package to a NuGet server
    restore    Download packages

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    FakeGet.dll [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    FakeGet.dll package.nupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    push       Upload a package to a NuGet server
    restore    Download packages

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    FakeGet.dll push [packagePath] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    FakeGet.dll package.nupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json

ARGUMENTS:
    [packagePath]    Path of package to push

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help           Prints help information                                
    -s, --source         The package source URL to upload the package           
    -k, --api-key        The API key for the server                             
        --interactive    Allow the command to block and require manual action   
                         for operations like authentication
